hooks.command: msg=$(cat | jq -r '.last_assistant_message // "Done"' | head -c 100 | tr -d "'\""); osascript -e "display notification \"$msg\" with title \"Claude Code\""; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Purr.aiff -v 1.75

msg=$(cat | jq -r '.message // ""' | sed 's/Claude wants to use //;s/Claude needs your permission to //' | head -c 100 | tr -d "'\""); osascript -e "display notification \"$msg\" with title \"Permission Needed\""; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Ping.aiff -v 1.75

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); root=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$root" ]; then repo=$(basename "$root"); rel=${cwd#"$root"}; path="/$repo$rel"; branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then echo "$path :$branch"; else echo "$path"; fi; else echo "/$(basename "$cwd")"; fi
